items.title: Hide Your Number on WhatsApp: How to Set a Username for Better Privacy
items.summary: WhatsApp is introducing usernames, allowing users to chat without sharing their phone numbers. Once available, you will be able to choose a unique username from the Settings men...

items.title: AI is being used to resurrect the voices of dead pilots
items.summary: People used AI on a spectrogram image of cockpit recordings to reconstruct them, forcing the NTSB to temporarily block access to its docket system.
